content.full_text:
December 18, 1990

TRANSMITTED BY FACSIMILE
(916) 327-2026

Fair Political Practices Commission
Sacramento, California

Dear Members of the Commission:

A situation has arisen that requires clarification from the Fair Political Practices Commission.

Is it possible for a legislator (state, federal, local and/or constitutional) to contribute from their campaign account or political action committee to the Special Supervisorial election in Los Angeles County. Do any limits apply; and if so, how much?

Thanking you in advance for your attention. We would appreciate your answer or determination in writing as quickly as possible. Please respond by return facsimile at (213) 382-7212.

Sincerely,

Tricia Riffenburgh
